name: client-onboarding
description: Onboard a new client professionally. Build an onboarding guide, create a welcome checklist, draft the kickoff email, and set up a project plan. First impressions matter.

config.instruction: Create a client onboarding guide covering: welcome overview, key contacts, communication channels, deliverables timeline, access/credentials they'll need, and what to expect in week 1.
Build an onboarding checklist for internal use: contracts signed, access granted, kickoff scheduled, tools provisioned, intro emails sent, first deliverable timeline confirmed.
Draft the welcome/kickoff email to the client. Professional, warm, includes: what happens next, who they'll work with, links to shared resources, and the first meeting time.
Create a 30-day project plan for the client engagement. Week-by-week milestones, deliverables, check-in cadence, and success metrics.
